title: The Saruyama Alliance Gets Involved
description: The crew’s chaotic hunt continues as the dangers of Jaya’s wildlife and the pressure of the coming current build.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Luffy, Nami. The crew’s chaotic hunt continues as the dangers of Jaya’s wildlife and the pressure of the coming current build.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: What kind of queer-assy cry is that?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So we'll split up into 3 teams!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Aghhh! They're falling down from the tree!

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: It's probably a type of tarantula.

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: Me neither! I hate them all!

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: Hurry up and toss it far away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Moths and Centipedes are not okay either!

summary: The crew’s chaotic hunt continues as the dangers of Jaya’s wildlife and the pressure of the coming current build.
